---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "Heartbleed"
date: 2020-08-10
summary: 'The limits of your language become the limits of my world'
trailer: "gallery/heartbleed/preview/turmite_52.png"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery()
```
